So, Tania, what is your big dream for the future?
Someday I would love to live abroad, maybe by the sea. And I hope to become fluent in English.
That is a wonderful goal! What is on your bucket list?
A long, slow trip across Europe. And I would like to retire early, so I can travel all year.
Big dreams! Do you think you can achieve them?
Yes! Every small step is a new opportunity. I really believe I can achieve my dreams.

Let me tell you about my big dream. Someday, I would love to live abroad, maybe by the sea. I hope to become fluent in two languages, so I can talk to anyone, anywhere. I have a small bucket list, and at the top is a long, slow trip across Europe. I would like to retire early and travel the whole year. It is a big goal, I know, but I really believe I can achieve it. Every small step is a new opportunity. What about you? What do you dream of?

A friend asked me about my goals for the next five years, so let me share them. First, I hope to learn to cook real Italian food. Then, I would like to visit Japan; it has been on my bucket list for years. I also wish to start my own small business someday. My biggest goal is to work abroad, because I would love to live in a new country. I know it will not be easy, but with hard work, I am sure I can achieve my dreams. Never stop dreaming.

First, I hope to become fluent in English this year. Then, I would like to travel abroad and see the world. After that, I wish to start my own small business someday. Next, my big goal is to retire early and live by the sea. Finally, I would love to cross every item off my bucket list, because every dream is a new opportunity.
